name: Peanut Butter Bread- Diary Free
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in the order listed, according to your bread machine settings.
2. Select either regular or light crust preference and press "Start".
3. To measure peanut butter, lightly coat a measuring cup with nonstick cooking spray or oil first. The peanut butter will then pour easily and slide out smoothly.
4. This recipe is dairy-free.
5. It works well on a rapid or quick bread setting.
6. If using the timer method, use active dry yeast instead of compressed yeast and utilize a yeast dispenser if available.
This is a delicious snack bread that also makes an excellent addition to lunchboxes for a twist on standard peanut butter and jelly sandwiches.
